evaluators.name: Save First Three 2024 Jumping Training Articles to Reading List
evaluators.description: Checks that the user saved the first three 2024 Training articles tagged with Jumping to the reading list.

evaluators.name: Comment on Newest Health Lameness Article
evaluators.description: Checks that the user commented (30+ words, required phrases, correct name/email) on the newest Health article tagged with Lameness.

evaluators.name: Favorite Earliest 2023 Competition Story
evaluators.description: Checks that the user favorited the earliest (oldest) 2023 Competitions article.

evaluators.name: Subscribe to Weekly HTML Newsletter with Training and Competition Topics
evaluators.description: Checks that the user created a newsletter subscription with weekly HTML emails for Training tips and Competition updates only.

evaluators.name: Create 5-Post Reading List and Group by Category
evaluators.description: Checks that the user saved exactly 2 Training, 2 Health, and 1 Gear article to the reading list and then grouped the reading list by category.

evaluators.name: Send Nutrition Advice Contact Message Referencing Oats Article and Date
evaluators.description: Checks that the user sent a nutrition advice contact message referencing the oats-feeding health article and its published date, with sufficient content and correct fields.

evaluators.name: Vote for Bow in Tricks Poll and Comment Explaining Vote
evaluators.description: Checks that the user voted for 'Bow' in the tricks poll and left a 20+ word comment mentioning bow on the tricks training article.

evaluators.name: Favorite Every Other 2022 Competition Photo in Gallery
evaluators.description: Checks that the user favorited four 2022 competition photos corresponding to every other image starting from the first in the gallery order.
